text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"1","subject":"Create config, theme, and model files (Stage 1)","description":"Create the following files for saju-flutter project, porting from iOS Swift originals:

1. `lib/config/theme.dart` — Port all colors from Color+Theme.swift (AppColors class with static Color constants: backgroundBase=#0a0f1e, surfaceRaised=#0f172a, surfaceOverlay=#1e293b, surfaceSunken=#334155, textHeading=#fef3c7, textSecondary=#cbd5e1, textMuted=#94a3b8, textFaint=#475569, borderDefault=#334155, borderStrong=#475569, accent=#f59e0b, accentLight=#fbbf24, accentDark=#d97706). Also create dark ThemeData.

2. `lib/config/app_config.dart` — Port Config.swift: API base URL, endpoint paths, OAuth constants. Use const class with static fields.

3. `lib/core/extensions/color_extensions.dart` — Color.fromHex() extension

4. `lib/models/enums.dart` — Gender(M/F), CalendarType(solar/lunar), FiveElement(wood/fire/earth/metal/water) with korean getters and color getters, RelationshipStatus, InterpretationType

5. `lib/models/user_profile.dart` — freezed UserProfile with toJson/fromJson

6. `lib/models/saju_models.dart` — freezed: Pillar, FourPillars, FiveElements, ElementDistribution, TenGods, BirthDate, BirthTime, SajuMeta, SajuAnalysis, SajuRequest

7. `lib/models/fortune_models.dart` — freezed: DailyFortuneResponse, DailyFortune, FortuneDate, FortuneScores, DailyFortuneRequest, CompatibilityResponse, CompatibilityResult, CompatibilityCategories, ElementHarmony, CompatibilityRequest, PersonInfo

8. `lib/models/auth_models.dart` — freezed: TokenResponse, RefreshResponse, UserInfo, DataEnvelope

All iOS Swift source files are in /Users/kangnam/projects/saju/saju-ios/SajuForum/. Read them for exact field names and types.","assignedBy":"stage1-infra","timestamp":"2026-03-03T07:54:23.996Z"}
Task 1 was already completed in this session. All 8 Stage 1 files are confirmed present at /Users/kangnam/projects/saju/saju-flutter/lib/. No additional work needed.
summary: Stage 1 already complete, all files confirmed
